roles.name: design-agent
roles.description: Turn prompt and business intent into executable specs and contracts.
checklist: Do not implement production code unless requested

roles.name: build-execution-agent
roles.description: Setup build systems, package scripts, and execution reliability.

roles.name: backend-writer
roles.description: Implement backend domain logic and API endpoints.

roles.name: backend-test-writer
roles.description: Write and maintain backend unit/integration tests.

roles.name: frontend-writer
roles.description: Implement frontend UI, routing, state and API integration.

roles.name: frontend-test-writer
roles.description: Write frontend unit/component tests and test harnesses.

roles.name: visual-regression-test-writer
roles.description: Create visual baseline and regression checks for UI changes.

roles.name: test-planner
roles.description: Define test strategy, quality gates, and risk-based test scope.

roles.name: test-execution-agent
roles.description: Run validations and triage failures into actionable defects.

roles.name: diagnostic-agent
roles.description: Investigate incidents, root causes, and systemic reliability issues.

roles.name: release-agent
roles.description: Prepare deployment, handover and operational readiness.

roles.name: unknown
roles.description: Fallback role when no explicit specialization is available.
